name: Sportradar Sports Data API
what_it_does: Sportradar Sports Data REST API for real-time and historical sports data, betting odds, and sports analytics. Enables AI agents to manage live game scores and play-by-play data for sports content applications, handle betting odds and market data for sportsbook and fantasy sports integration, access player statistics and performance analytics for sports analytics platforms, retrieve schedule and results data for sports scheduling applications, manage fantasy sports projection and lineup data for DFS platform integration, handle sports betting integrity monitoring for compliance and fraud detection, access league and team metadata for sports information management, retrieve media rights and broadcast data for sports content distribution, manage in-play betting data streams for real-time sports wagering, and integrate Sportradar data with media, betting, and sports analytics platforms.
use_cases: Delivering live scores from sports content agents
Providing betting odds from sportsbook agents
Powering fantasy projections from DFS platform agents
Monitoring betting integrity from compliance agents
not_for: Non-sports applications without sports data context
Consumer applications without proper sports data licensing
Organizations without sports betting regulatory compliance
best_when: A sports media company, sportsbook, fantasy sports platform, or sports analytics firm using Sportradar wants AI agents to automate live data delivery, odds management, fantasy projections, and sports analytics workflow.
avoid_when: SPORTS BETTING REGULATORY RISK: Sportradar betting odds data is regulated sports wagering information — use in sportsbook applications requires state sports betting license in each operating jurisdiction; unlicensed use of betting data for gambling operations creates federal and state criminal exposure. League data licensing — Sportradar has exclusive official data partnerships with major leagues (NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL); unauthorized use of official league data outside license scope violates IP rights and may violate Wire Act. Fantasy sports DFS — daily fantasy sports is regulated differently than sports betting across US states; verify DFS legality and license requirements in each state before automating DFS platform operations.

auth.notes: Sportradar uses API key authentication. Developer portal at developer.sportradar.com. Push feeds (webhooks) for live data. REST API with JSON. Betradar division for betting data. St. Gallen, Switzerland HQ. Public (SRAD NASDAQ). Founded 2001. $7B+ valuation. Official data partner to NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, and major European football leagues. Market leader in sports data and betting integrity. Competes with Stats Perform and Genius Sports for official sports data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial tier with rate limits and delayed data
pricing.paid_tiers: API subscription tiers; enterprise licensing for betting and official data
pricing.notes: St. Gallen, Switzerland. Founded 2001. Public (SRAD NASDAQ). $7B+ valuation. NFL/NBA/MLB/NHL official data partner. Sports data market leader. Competes with Stats Perform and Genius Sports.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key tier; real-time endpoints have higher limits

known_agent_gotchas: SPORTS BETTING REGULATION: Sportradar betting odds data requires state sports betting license for sportsbook applications; unlicensed betting data use in gambling operations creates state criminal exposure and federal Wire Act risk

League data licensing scope — Sportradar holds official data licenses with NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL with specific use restrictions; automated data use outside license scope (geographic, use case, or platform) violates IP rights

DFS state-by-state legality — daily fantasy sports legality varies by state; automated DFS platform operations must verify current DFS legality in each state; some states (WA, AZ historic) prohibit DFS

Betting integrity reporting obligations — Sportradar operates betting integrity monitoring for leagues; automated suspicious betting pattern detection creates mandatory reporting obligations to league and regulator

Live data push reliability — Sportradar push feeds (real-time data streams) require robust connection management and reconnect logic; dropped push connection during game creates data gap in live applications

API key tier limitations — Sportradar has multiple API tiers with different data coverage and latency; free/trial tier has significant data limitations; verify enterprise tier for betting and official league data access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Sports data. SOC2, ISO27001. API key. US/EU. Sports and betting data. Regulated use restrictions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Sports data API. SOC2, ISO27001. API key. US/EU. Sports and betting data. License restrictions.
